prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在4900–5500名区间震荡、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数基本稳定、工科热门专业保持高热、学校声誉偏负面 等因素，在2025年基准5103名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约5153名，区间4653–5653名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3874 → 5487 → 5494 → 4897 → 5103, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. After a significant drop in 2022, it has oscillated within the 4900–5500 range in recent three years; the 2025 baseline is about 5103. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category in this province was 54 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 55 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 55, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, indicating a basically stable competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been stable at 33rd–34th from 2021 to 2026, with a slight upward trend in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 985 level; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident raising campus safety concerns; Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.93 million, placing it at an upper-middle level among 985 universities on short video platforms, with moderate application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Civil Engineering is A+, Mechanical Engineering is A-, Environmental Science and Engineering is A-, Electrical Engineering is A-, and Landscape Architecture is A-, highlighting strong engineering strength; Electrical Engineering (A-) corresponds to the enrollment major Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Mechanical Engineering (A-) corresponds to the Engineering Experimental Class (High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing), both being flagship directions of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation was highly recommended in 2024, Computer Science remains consistently hot, Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, and popular engineering majors maintain relatively high application enthusiasm; in 2026, the number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (Physics Category 143,000 + History Category 56,000 ≈ 200,000), with no significant change in competitive pressure; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has been stable between 336–368 points in recent five years, with 2025 at 367 points, showing little fluctuation; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing (Southwest region), representing an inter-provincial application for Liaoning candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning is about 2.3%–3.5% (in 2025, total university enrollment about 598, with 51 in Liaoning accounting for 8.5%), making Liaoning an important source province for the university in Northeast China; in terms of regional preference, Southwest universities have general appeal to Northeast candidates, with no significant regional advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical rankings oscillating within the 4900–5500 range, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, basically stable total number of candidates, persistently high popularity of engineering majors, and somewhat negative university reputation, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 5103; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5153, with a range of 4653–5653.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Program) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Computer Science and Technology (Top-Notch Program)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Communication Engineering, Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, Robotics Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Connected Vehicle Innovation Class) (Vehicle Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Vehicle Engineering, Aerospace Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials) (Energy and Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 4653–5653, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Future Information, Computer and Intelligent Software) as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors (Excellence Program, Electrical Engineering, Computer Top-Notch Program) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (High-end Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing, Smart Energy and Advanced Materials) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4653), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated approximately from 760 to 871 to 673 to 731 to 747, overall within the 670–870 range, reaching its best in 2023 (673), with a slight decline in 2024–2025; the 2025 baseline is about 747. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 8 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 4 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 6, an increase of 2 (50%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that notably eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 33rd–34th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the mid-tier 985 institutions. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation is somewhat negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident raising campus safety concerns; its Douyin popularity ranks 23rd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.93 million, placing it at an above-average level among 985 universities on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Civil Engineering received A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Landscape Architecture A-. The History Category enrollment majors are Humanities Experimental Class (Law and Journalism) and Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class). Law, corresponding to the first-level discipline of Law, and Chinese Language and Literature, corresponding to Chinese Language and Literature, were not separately evaluated.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Law is in a wait-and-see state of differentiation, while Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; liberal arts majors have medium-to-high popularity. In 2026, Liaoning Province has about 200,000 general college entrance examination candidates, with History Category estimated at about 56,000 based on the recent proportion (about 28%), roughly the same as 2025 (56,000). The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch was 437 in 2025, fluctuating between 400–456 in recent years. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing (Southwest China), making it a cross-province application for Liaoning candidates. The university's History Category enrollment in Liaoning is small (4–8 people), and even with the expansion to 6 in 2026, it remains a small-scale enrollment, so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the key positive factor of a 50% expansion in History Category enrollment in 2026 (from 4 to 6), the basically stable total number of candidates, the medium popularity of liberal arts majors, and the somewhat negative university reputation, the predicted minimum ranking is about 951, with a range of 451–1451.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 451–1451, History Category has only two enrollment majors. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Humanities Experimental Class (Law and Journalism) as the main target, and use Tier 1 Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class) as a reach. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<451), prioritize reaching for Chinese Language and Literature.
